creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of articles/explaining-bsd has become outdated due to
changes in the original text of articles/explaining-bsd.

Fix: 

There are patches in http://chaos.ukrhub.net/FDP/explaining-bsd/doc.ru.articles.explaining-bsd.diff.tbz that might fix the problem.
How-To-Repeat:   Compare the revision of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/explaining-bsd/article.sgml and 'Original revision' in http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/explaining-bsd/article.sgml?rev=1.5;content-type=text%2Fplain
